project.description: If not provided, the project is parsed from the parent identifier; if missing there too, the provider project is used.
project.rationale: Ensures the binding lands in the intended tenant; a mismatch can grant access in the wrong project.

member/members.description: Principals to bind. Supported: allUsers, allAuthenticatedUsers, user:{email}, serviceAccount:{email}, group:{email}, domain:{domain}, projectOwner:projectid, projectEditor:projectid, projectViewer:projectid.
member/members.rationale: Controls who can access IAP-protected web apps; public or malformed identities overexpose endpoints.
member/members.non-compliant: member = "allUsers" / "allAuthenticatedUsers" / values with whitespace like " user:alice@example.com "

role.description: `google_iap_web_iam_binding`/`..._member` grant a specific role. Custom roles must be `[projects|organizations]/{parent}/roles/{role-name}`.
role.rationale: Use least privilege for IAP access to HTTPS resources.

policy_data.description: A `google_iam_policy` data source (authoritative when used with the *_policy resource).
policy_data.rationale: Authoritative replacement of IAM applies to `google_iap_web_iam_policy`; not used by *_member or *_binding.
policy_data.compliant: policy_data references data.google_iam_policy with the intended bindings (for *_policy).
policy_data.non-compliant: policy_data mis-scoped to the wrong resource or missing required bindings.

condition.description: Optional IAM Condition to scope the binding (e.g., by request host/path, time, or device context).
condition.rationale: Reduces blast radius by restricting when/where the binding applies.
condition.compliant: condition { title = "OfficeHours" description = "Limit access to business hours" expression = "request.time.getHours() >= 8 && request.time.getHours() < 18" }
condition.non-compliant: Empty condition block or empty expression

expression.description: CEL expression that decides when the binding applies.
expression.rationale: Must be specific and non-empty to be effective.

description.description: ~> Warning: Terraform considers the `role` and condition contents (`title`+`description`+`expression`) as the identifier for the binding. Changing any part out-of-band is treated as a different resource.
description.compliant: description = "Restrict IAP to app.example.com during office hours"
description.non-compliant: Omitting context when intent is non-obvious
